description: Table experience du mod TCP (colonnes documentees via le D2R Data Guide).
source: Colonnes du .txt (mod TCP) ; types/descriptions du D2R Data Guide (guide/).

columns.name: Level
columns.description: This is a reference field to define the level

columns.name: Amazon
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Amazon class

columns.name: Sorceress
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Sorceress class

columns.name: Necromancer
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Necromancer class

columns.name: Paladin
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Paladin class

columns.name: Barbarian
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Barbarian class

columns.name: Druid
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Druid class

columns.name: Assassin
columns.description: Controls the Experience required for each level with the Assassin class

columns.name: ExpRatio
columns.description: This multiplier affects the percentage of Experienced earned, based on the level (Calculated in 1024ths by default, but this can be changed by updating the "10" value in the "Maxlvl" row)
